mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.is_best, p.img_url, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.category_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.category_detail_id FROM product_tb p LEFT JOIN product_detail_tb pd ON pd.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_category_tb pc ON pc.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN category_tb c ON c.category_detail_id = p.category_detail_id WHERE p.category_detail_id = #{categoryDetailId} GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.is_best, p.img_url, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.category_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.category_detail_id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.product_id) FROM product_tb p LEFT JOIN product_detail_tb pd ON pd.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_category_tb pc ON pc.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN category_tb c ON c.category_detail_id = p.category_detail_id WHERE p.category_detail_id = #{categoryDetailId}

SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.is_best, p.img_url, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.category_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.category_detail_id FROM product_tb p LEFT JOIN product_detail_tb pd ON pd.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_category_tb pc ON pc.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN category_tb c ON c.category_detail_id = p.category_detail_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.is_best, p.img_url, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.category_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.category_detail_id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.is_best, p.img_url, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.category_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.category_detail_id FROM product_tb p LEFT JOIN product_detail_tb pd ON pd.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_category_tb pc ON pc.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN category_tb c ON c.category_detail_id = p.category_detail_id WHERE p.category_id = #{categoryId} GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.is_best, p.img_url, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.category_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.category_detail_id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.is_best, p.img_url, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.category_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.category_detail_id FROM product_tb p LEFT JOIN product_detail_tb pd ON pd.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_category_tb pc ON pc.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN category_tb c ON c.category_detail_id = p.category_detail_id WHERE p.category_detail_id = #{categoryDetailId} GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.is_best, p.img_url, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.category_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.category_detail_id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_tb ( product_name, description, is_best, img_url, price, quick_rundown, category_id, created_at, updated_at, category_detail_id ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{description}, #{best}, #{imgUrl}, #{price}, #{quickRundown}, #{categoryId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{categoryDetailId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE product_tb SET product_name = #{productName}, description = #{description}, is_best = #{best}, img_url = #{imgUrl}, price = #{price}, quick_rundown = #{quickRundown}, category_id = #{categoryId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, category_detail_id = #{categoryDetailId} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.is_best, p.img_url, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.category_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.category_detail_id FROM product_tb p WHERE p.is_best = 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.product_id, p.category_id, p.category_detail_id, p.product_name, p.description, p.best, p.price, p.quick_rundown, p.created_at, p.updated_at, t.product_thumnail_id, t.product_url FROM product_tb p LEFT JOIN product_thumbnail_tb t ON p.product_id = t.product_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
